summary: Build a simple marketing website for a food business to showcase the menu, share the business story, and provide customer contact options.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Food-themed hero banner image with appetizing plated food on a warm neutral background (hero-food.dim_1600x900.png)
- Simple minimalist logo mark for a food business in warm earthy tones (logo-mark.dim_512x512.png)

existing_features.title: Create a responsive multi-page marketing website for a food business with clear navigation and the following pages/sections: Home (hero + highlights), Menu (categorized items with name/description/price), About/Story (business story + values), and Contact (contact details + contact form). All user-facing text must be in English.
Implement a coherent visual theme for the food business site and apply it consistently across pages (color palette, typography, spacing, component styling). Do not use a blue/purple primary palette.
Add a contact form submission flow that persists submissions in the Motoko backend. The frontend should submit the form to the backend and show success/error feedback to the user.

Generate and include static image assets for the site (stored under frontend/public/assets/generated) and use them in the UI (e.g., a hero banner image and a simple logo mark). Do not serve these images from the backend.

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a food business website with menu showcase, story/about section, and contact page/form

projectName: Food business marketing website (Menu, About/Story, Contact)
